description_long: This object is a wedge-shaped piece of cheese with a smooth, slightly glossy yellow surface and scattered small holes typical of Swiss or Emmental cheese. The cheese has a triangular cross-section, with rounded edges and a slightly domed top. The surface shows subtle indentations and a few darker spots, suggesting natural aging or minor imperfections. The sides are mostly uniform in color, with some areas appearing slightly darker, possibly indicating a firmer rind or exposure to air. The bottom appears flat and slightly textured, resembling a cut surface from a larger wheel. There is no visible packaging, branding, or additional markings on the cheese.
description: A wedge of yellow cheese with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and scattered small holes, resembling Swiss or Emmental cheese.
description_view_0: The cheese wedge is seen from above, highlighting its triangular shape, smooth yellow surface, and a few small holes and dark spots.
description_view_1: This side view shows the length of the wedge, with a gently sloping top and several small holes visible along the side.
description_view_2: The back view displays the flat, cut surface of the cheese, showing a subtle texture and a uniform yellow color.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, but with a clearer view of the wedge's thickness and more visible holes on the surface.
attribute_rind_appearance: The outer surface is slightly darker and firmer in some areas, with a smooth, thin appearance and no distinct thick rind.
